title: DHS Nicobars Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Public Health Nurse & TBHV-NTEP Posts
short_info: District Health Society, Nicobar District (DHS Nicobars) has published the Public Health Nurse (PHN) & TBHV-NTEP Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. M-17030(11)/77/2024-O/O DHS-DCNIC-DCNIC_AN. The recruitment drive aims to fill 5 Public Health Nurse (PHN) & TBHV-NTEP positions. Candidates holding qualifications such as 12th-pass, Diploma, or Any Graduate in relevant disciplines are eligible to apply through offline mode at Andaman & Nicobar Administration Official Website. The application process will remain active up to 13-06-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF a

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Public Health Nurse (PHN): All India Senior School Certificate Examination (10+2) or equivalent. Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery (3 1/2 years). One year Diploma in Public Health Nursing or Basic B.Sc. (Nursing) degree (4 year) from a recognized university or board and registered with the Nursing Council of India. TBHV-NTEP: Graduate in science OR Intermediate (10+2) in science and experience of working as MPW/LHV/ANM/Health worker/Certificate OR Higher course in Health Education/Counselling OR Tuberculosis health visitor's recognized course. Certificate course in computer operations (minimum two months). Preferential: Training course for MPW or recognized sanitary inspector course.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 21,632/- for Public Health Nurse and Rs. 18,434/- for TBHV-NTEP

selection_process: Selection of candidates will be on the merit of candidate qualifications and experience
and a merit list will be prepared. Merit list will be published in The Daily Telegram
AN Website and simultaneously displayed on the notice board of the DHS-Nicobar District for claims and objections
with a grace period of 7 days.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Nicobars Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: andamannicobar.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
